title_en: Fever vs Storm Recap — Transition defense and turnover cost
title_zh: Fever vs Storm 回顾 — 转换防守与失误管理
summary_en: Fastbreak points and turnover cost as key variables. Fever improved retreat speed, but top-of-arc protection still needs work.
summary_zh: 快攻失分与失误成本是关键变量。Fever 回防速度提升但弧顶保护仍需优化。
storyline_en: Opening: frequent transition, defensive shape hard to restore.
Mid-game: early switching to protect top-of-arc.
Closing: turnovers clustered in drives and passes.
storyline_zh: 开局：转换进攻频繁，防守落位难以还原。
中段：提前换防尝试保护弧顶。
收尾：失误类型集中在持球突破与传导。
tactics_zh: 提前换防：阻断弧顶启动
弱侧协防：缩小禁区出手
